summary: Iteration 10 — Color palette brand update frontend testing. All key pages verified: landing page (/), login, customer dashboard, admin dashboard. New Homesqre palette (#0C1D42 navy, #DA9E3E gold, #FCFAF5 ivory, #F5EDE8 blush, #333333 charcoal) is correctly applied throughout. Zero old green (#06402B) or old gold (#B68D40) found anywhere in the computed styles.

design_issues.screen: Landing page hero (Home.jsx) - right-side form card
issues: Requirement specifies 'ivory form sidebar' but the actual landing page (Home.jsx) uses a dark glassmorphic card (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl) instead of ivory (#FCFAF5). Interiors.jsx has the ivory sidebar but is NOT routed — /interiors redirects to /. The Home.jsx hero card is intentionally dark by design (glassmorphism effect). Main agent to decide: add /interiors route OR accept Home.jsx's dark card.

design_issues.screen: Built to make life easier section (Home.jsx)
issues: Section background is charcoal #333333 (not navy #0C1D42). Requirement says 'dark bg (navy/charcoal)' — charcoal is acceptable. Note that Interiors.jsx version uses navy #0C1D42 but is not routed.

landing_page_hero.note: Form card uses dark glassmorphic (bg-black/40). See design_issues above.

admin_dashboard.gold_charts: Top Lead Sources bar chart in gold

green_colors_remaining_intentional: WhatsApp link uses text-green-600 — intentional (WhatsApp brand color)
Approved status badges use bg-green-100 text-green-800 — semantic status color, not brand
ACTIVE status uses text-green-600 — semantic status color, not brand
CustomerDesignReview approved badge uses bg-green-50 border-green-200 text-green-800 — semantic
Success toast (Sonner library) uses green checkmark — library default, not brand

routing_note.interiors_jsx_status: File exists at /app/frontend/src/pages/Interiors.jsx but is NOT registered as a route in App.js
routing_note.interiors_url_behavior: /interiors URL redirects to / (home page) via catch-all Route path='*'
routing_note.app_js_comment: App.js has comment '/* HOMEPAGE - 100% INTERIORS FOCUSED */' confirming Home.jsx is the intended landing page
routing_note.recommendation: Either add '<Route path="/interiors" element={<Interiors />} />' to App.js if Interiors.jsx should be accessible, OR remove Interiors.jsx as dead code

action_items: DECISION: /interiors route not in App.js. Interiors.jsx is orphaned. Main agent should either (1) add the route, or (2) remove the file as dead code.

DESIGN FEEDBACK: Landing page hero right-side form card uses dark glassmorphic bg (bg-black/40), not ivory. If spec requires ivory sidebar, update Home.jsx hero form card bg from bg-black/40 to bg-[#FCFAF5] and change text colors accordingly.

OPTIONAL: Consider using bg-[#0C1D42] instead of bg-[#333333] for 'Built to make life easier' section in Home.jsx to match navy brand color more precisely (though charcoal is in the approved palette).
critical_code_review_comments: Interiors.jsx (824 lines) is an orphaned file — no route registered in App.js. Either route it or delete it to prevent confusion.
Home.jsx (824 lines) serves dual purpose as interiors landing page (comment: '100% INTERIORS FOCUSED'). The file is at the size limit for complexity.
index.css correctly uses --hs-emerald as alias pointing to #0C1D42 (navy) for backward compat — clean approach.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes — testability is good.
Dev toolbar gated behind process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' — correct pattern.

success_rate.frontend: 95% — color palette correctly applied on all tested pages; 1 design deviation (form sidebar) noted

test_credentials: customer@homesqre.com / Customer@2026 (currently in 'unpaid' phase — package picker shows); admin@homesqre.com / Homesqre@2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Color palette update is applied correctly. No old green (#06402B) or old gold (#B68D40) found anywhere. Key palette: navy #0C1D42, gold #DA9E3E, ivory #FCFAF5, blush #F5EDE8, charcoal #333333. Only issue: hero form sidebar is dark glassmorphic (not ivory as spec says). Interiors.jsx is orphaned (not routed). customer@homesqre.com is in 'unpaid' phase showing package picker.
